about.title: About PAARR ever
about.subtitle: More than just a supermarket, we are your neighborhood’s trusted shopping companion. At PAARR ever, we believe that shopping for grocery & daily essential should be simple, joyful, and rewarding. With carefully chosen products, fair prices, and an inviting shopping experience, we are here to make your everyday easier.
about.missionSubTitle: To bring everyday essentials and quality products closer to our communities through conveniently located, customer-friendly neighborhood stores that prioritize good shopping experience, embrace technology, and deliver affordability.
about.visionSubTitle: To become the most trusted and preferred neighborhood supermarket chain with clean, well-organized, and tech-enabled stores that bring freshness, local value, and convenience to most corners of the city.
about.range: Range that makes you fall in love
about.place: A place that feels just like home
